name: clear_red_watchlist
description: Clears the TradingView red watchlist and tracker file so tickers from the previous day don't carry over

name: clear_ah_watchlist
description: Clears the TradingView orange (after hours) watchlist and tracker at 12:55pm PST daily on weekdays

name: clear_pm_watchlist
description: Clears the TradingView green (pre-market) watchlist and tracker at 11pm PST daily

name: rotate_today_watchlist
description: Moves Today's top 15 tickers to the day-of-week watchlist and clears Today at 11:59pm PST weekdays

name: backup_teslamate
description: Dumps TeslaMate PostgreSQL database and uploads to Google Drive

name: backup_stocks
description: Dumps stocks MySQL database (iu) and uploads to Google Drive
